papers.title: Observation of intermolecular Coulombic decay in liquid water
papers.abstract: We report the first observation of intermolecular Coulombic decay (ICD) in liquid water following inner-valence ionization. By combining a monochromatized table-top high-harmonic source with a liquid ...

papers.title: Implementation of a double-path multimode interferometer using a spinor Bose-Einstein condensate
papers.abstract: We realize a double-path multimode matter wave interferometer with spinor Bose-Einstein condensate and observe clear spatial interference fringes as well as a periodic change of the visibility in the ...

papers.title: Serial coherent diffraction imaging of dynamic samples based on inter-frame constraint
papers.abstract: We proposed a novel approach to coherent imaging of dynamic samples. The inter-frame similarity of the sample's local structures is found to be a powerful constraint in phasing a sequence of diffracti...

papers.title: Robust Ptychographic Reconstruction with an Out-of-Focus Electron Probe

papers.title: A high-performance reconstruction method for partially coherent ptychography
